name: TestInfoHeadingBegin
title: TestInfoHeadingBegin
description: Starts a header row into a table. A header row can be divided into multiple columns using the function TestInfoCell.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: Handle to the table created by the function TestInfoTable.

parameters.name: indent
parameters.description: Level of indentation for the header row.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
